---
title: "H1"
author: ""
date: "2026-03-02"
output: html_document
---

# Input

```{r}
#Libraries
library(pacman)
p_load(lavaan, rio, tidyverse, psych, here, stargazer, summarytools, visdat,
       EGAnet, qgraph, ggplot2, haven, janitor, readxl, labelled, reshape2,
       openxlsx, mgm, bootnet, conflicted, magick, cocron, lme4, broom.mixed,
       patchwork, huge)

#Options
rm(list = ls())
options(scipen = 999)
#conflicts
conflicts_prefer(dplyr::filter)
conflicts_prefer(dplyr::select)

# Data
master_datasets <- readRDS(here("Input", "Secondary", "master_datasets.rds"))
```

# Processing

## Preparation

```{r}
# Initialize an empty list 
H1_matrices <- list()

# Loop through the master list to extract and split data 
for (study_name in names(master_datasets)) {
  
  df <- master_datasets[[study_name]]
  
  # For H1 we keep only country, CM, and cbs
  df_clean <- df %>%
    select(country, CM, starts_with("cb_")) %>%
    na.omit()
  
  # Split by country
  split_df <- split(df_clean[, setdiff(names(df_clean), "country")], df_clean$country)
  
  # Convert to matrices, apply nonparanormal transformation, and assign names
  for (country_name in names(split_df)) {
    list_name <- paste0(study_name, "_", country_name)
    
    # 1. Convert to raw matrix
    raw_matrix <- as.matrix(split_df[[country_name]])
    
    # 2. Apply the nonparanormal transformation and store directly in H1_matrices
    H1_matrices[[list_name]] <- huge.npn(raw_matrix, verbose = FALSE)
  }
}
```


## Network estimation and plotting

```{r}
# usual colors
Totalgroup_cols_H1 <- c("#966FD6", "#006B3C") 

for (name in names(H1_matrices)) {
  
  data_matrix <- H1_matrices[[name]]
  n_vars <- ncol(data_matrix)
  node_names <- colnames(data_matrix)
  
  # generate type and level 
  type_vec <- rep("g", n_vars)
  level_vec <- rep(1, n_vars)
  
  # estimation
  mgm_result <- mgm(
    data_matrix, type = type_vec, level = level_vec,
    lambdaSel = "CV", ruleReg = "OR", verbose = FALSE, pbar = FALSE
  )
  
  # Predictability
  pred_result <- predict(object = mgm_result, data = data_matrix, errorCon = 'R2')
  
  # assign to groups 
  groups_H1 <- list(
    "CB items" = which(grepl("^cb_", node_names)),
    "CM Index" = which(node_names == "CM")
  )
  
  # output path 
  output_path <- here("Output", "H1", "Country_networks", paste0(name, ".png"))

  # Open device
  png(output_path, width = 4.15, height = 5.85, units = "in", res = 600)

  # plot 
  qgraph(
    mgm_result$pairwise$wadj, layout = "spring", labels = node_names,
    groups = groups_H1,  
    color = Totalgroup_cols_H1, legend = FALSE,
    title = name, edge.color = mgm_result$pairwise$edgecolor_cb,
    vTrans = 180, borders = TRUE, vsize = 10, esize = 7, label.cex = 0.50,
    label.scale = FALSE, 
    pie = pred_result$errors[,2], 
    pieColor = rep('#FFFF00', n_vars)
  )

  dev.off()
}
```

```{r}
# Figures for the supplement

# Directories 
input_dir <- here("Output", "H1", "Country_networks")
output_dir <- here("Output", "H1", "Composite_Figures")
dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# Fetch all PNGs 
all_pngs <- list.files(input_dir, pattern = "\\.png$", full.names = TRUE)

# STUDY 1: 8 Countries 
study1_files <- all_pngs[grepl("Study1", all_pngs)]
if (length(study1_files) == 8) {
  
  imgs_1a <- lapply(study1_files[1:4], image_read)
  imgs_1b <- lapply(study1_files[5:8], image_read)
  
  comp_1a <- image_montage(image_join(imgs_1a), tile = "2x2", geometry = "+50+50")
  comp_1b <- image_montage(image_join(imgs_1b), tile = "2x2", geometry = "+50+50")
  
  # Save 
  image_write(comp_1a, path = here(output_dir, "H1_Study1_Composite_A.png"), format = "png")
  image_write(comp_1b, path = here(output_dir, "H1_Study1_Composite_B.png"), format = "png")
}

#  STUDY 2
study2_files <- all_pngs[grepl("Study2", all_pngs)]
if (length(study2_files) == 1) {
  file.copy(from = study2_files[1], to = here(output_dir, "H1_Study2_Composite.png"), overwrite = TRUE)
}

#STUDY 3 CMQ: 
study3_cmq_files <- all_pngs[grepl("Study3_CMQ", all_pngs)]
if (length(study3_cmq_files) == 8) {
  
  imgs_3a_cmq <- lapply(study3_cmq_files[1:4], image_read)
  imgs_3b_cmq <- lapply(study3_cmq_files[5:8], image_read)
  
  comp_3a_cmq <- image_montage(image_join(imgs_3a_cmq), tile = "2x2", geometry = "+50+50")
  comp_3b_cmq <- image_montage(image_join(imgs_3b_cmq), tile = "2x2", geometry = "+50+50")
  
  # Save 
  image_write(comp_3a_cmq, path = here(output_dir, "H1_Study3_CMQ_Composite_A.png"), format = "png")
  image_write(comp_3b_cmq, path = here(output_dir, "H1_Study3_CMQ_Composite_B.png"), format = "png")
}

```


## Bootstrapping

```{r}
# mgm boots by country

# # Set seed for exact reproducibility
# set.seed(123)
# 
# # empty list
# boot_results_H1 <- list()
# 
# # Loop across all matrices dynamically
# for (name in names(H1_matrices)) {
#   cat("Bootstrapping", name, "...\n")
#   
#   country_matrix <- H1_matrices[[name]]
#   
#   # bootnet 
#   boot_result <- bootnet(
#     country_matrix,
#     nBoots = 1000,
#     nCores = 16, 
#     default = "mgm",
#     statistics = "strength"
#   )
#     
#   boot_results_H1[[name]] <- boot_result
# }
# 
# # Save locally
# saveRDS(boot_results_H1, here("Input", "Secondary", "boot_H1_master.rds"))

# Load to save time
boot_results_H1 <- readRDS(here("Input", "Secondary", "boot_H1_master.rds"))
```

## Violins

```{r}
# Empty list 
boot_dataframes <- list()

# reshape based on the specific node count of each dataset
for (name in names(boot_results_H1)) {
  
  values <- boot_results_H1[[name]][["bootTable"]][["value"]]
  
  # Fetch node names and counts 
  node_names <- colnames(H1_matrices[[name]])
  n_nodes <- length(node_names)
  
  # Reshape vector into a matrix
  values_matrix <- matrix(values, ncol = n_nodes, byrow = TRUE)
  
  # Convert to df
  values_dataframe <- as.data.frame(values_matrix)
  colnames(values_dataframe) <- node_names
  
  boot_dataframes[[name]] <- values_dataframe
}

# Melt dfs individually first, then bind 
long_boot_list <- lapply(names(boot_dataframes), function(name) {
  df <- boot_dataframes[[name]]
  df$Dataset <- name 
  melt(df, id.vars = "Dataset", variable.name = "Node", value.name = "Centrality")
})

# Combine all the long-format dfs
long_boot_data <- do.call(rbind, long_boot_list)

# Clean data
long_boot_data <- long_boot_data %>%
  mutate(
    # raw country string
    CountryRaw = Dataset %>%
      str_remove("Study1_SUSPECTS_") %>%
      str_remove("Study2_ACTS_") %>%
      str_remove("Study3_CMQ_"),
    
    # from ISO to full names
    CountryName = case_when(
      CountryRaw == "DEU" ~ "Germany",
      CountryRaw == "ESP" ~ "Spain",
      CountryRaw == "FRA" ~ "France",
      CountryRaw == "GBR" ~ "United Kingdom",
      CountryRaw == "ITA" ~ "Italy",
      CountryRaw == "POL" ~ "Poland",
      CountryRaw == "SWE" ~ "Sweden",
      CountryRaw %in% c("USA", "USA_ACTS") ~ "United States",
      TRUE ~ CountryRaw # Leaves Study 3 names (e.g., "Brazil", "Morocco") as is
    ),
    
    # Assign acronym of the CM scales
    ScaleAcronym = case_when(
      grepl("Study1", Dataset) ~ "GCB5",
      grepl("Study2", Dataset) ~ "ACTS",
      grepl("Study3_CMQ", Dataset) ~ "CMQ"
    ),
    
    # Combine into the final facet title
    FacetTitle = paste0(CountryName, " - ", ScaleAcronym)
  )

# Calculate 95% bootstrapped CIs 
ci_data <- long_boot_data %>%
  group_by(FacetTitle, Node) %>%
  summarise(
    lower = quantile(Centrality, probs = 0.025),
    upper = quantile(Centrality, probs = 0.975),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Colors
violin_colors <- ifelse(unique(long_boot_data$Node) == "CM", "#006B3C", "#966FD6")
names(violin_colors) <- unique(long_boot_data$Node)

# Define the 4 plot groups and y-axis limits
plot_groups <- list(
  "Study1"     = list(prefix = "Study1_",      y_lim = c(0.4, 1.2)),
  "Study2"     = list(prefix = "Study2_",      y_lim = NULL),        # Default limits for Study 2
  "Study3_CMQ" = list(prefix = "Study3_CMQ_",  y_lim = c(0, 1.3))
)

# Generate and save a plots
for (group_name in names(plot_groups)) {
  
  # Extract group settings
  prefix <- plot_groups[[group_name]]$prefix
  y_lim <- plot_groups[[group_name]]$y_lim
  
  # Filter data 
  group_long_data <- long_boot_data %>% filter(grepl(paste0("^", prefix), Dataset))
  group_ci_data <- ci_data %>% filter(FacetTitle %in% unique(group_long_data$FacetTitle))
  
  #the plot
  group_plot <- ggplot(group_long_data, aes(x = Node, y = Centrality, fill = Node)) +
    geom_violin(alpha = 0.8) +
    geom_errorbar(data = group_ci_data, aes(x = Node, ymin = lower, ymax = upper), 
                  width = 0.2, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = violin_colors) +
    facet_wrap(~ FacetTitle, scales = "free_x", ncol = 2) +  
    labs(
      title = paste("H1 Bootstrapped Centrality:", group_name),
      x = "Node",
      y = "Centrality"
    ) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 18, face = "bold"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
    )
  
  # Apply fixed Y-axis limits 
  if (!is.null(y_lim)) {
    group_plot <- group_plot + scale_y_continuous(limits = y_lim)
  }
  
  # adjust height based on the number of panels
  n_panels <- length(unique(group_long_data$FacetTitle))
  plot_height <- max(6, ceiling(n_panels / 2) * 3) 
  
  # Save 
output_filename <- here("Output", "H1", paste0("H1_Centrality_", group_name, ".png"))
  ggsave(output_filename, plot = group_plot, device = "png", 
         width = 10, height = plot_height, units = "in", dpi = 600)
}
```
